title: What happens to the emails created by a user through Emails & Activities when the user is deleted?
excerpt: If an account is using emails and activities emails, and they are tracking emails. What happens if that person leaves the company. Do the users emails get deleted or do they stay there so you can reference them?

posts.author: Simple_Support (Arslan Sajid)
posts.cookedHtml: If an account is using emails and activities emails, and they are tracking emails. What happens if that person leaves the company. Do the users emails get deleted or do they stay there so you can reference them?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Emails and Activities is integrated with their email accounts - that is where the data is stored. So the emails remain in the users email account (which assuming its a corporate account, you’d be able to deal with per your standard email retention process)
